---
title: "Program × PI Matrix"
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
---

```{python}
import json
from pathlib import Path
from IPython.display import HTML, display

_candidates = [Path("data/piid-project.json"), Path("../data/piid-project.json")]
data_file = next((p for p in _candidates if p.exists()), None)
if data_file is None:
    raise FileNotFoundError(
        "data/piid-project.json not found. "
        "Run: python NceGitLab.py --report piid-project"
    )

d               = json.loads(data_file.read_text())
group           = d["group"]
project_labels  = d["project_labels"]
piid_labels     = d["piid_labels"]
piid_meta       = d["piid_meta"]
cells           = d["cells"]
```

```{python}
HTML(f"""
<p>
  <strong>Report Date:</strong> {d['report_date']} &nbsp;|&nbsp;
  <strong>Group:</strong> <a href="{group['url']}" target="_blank">{group['name']}</a>
</p>
<p>Each cell: <strong>Status · Epics (open/total) · % Done (PI elapsed%) · Planned → Actual pt</strong></p>""")
```

```{python}
import re as _re

def _abbrev_piid(p):
    """PIID::2024Q1 → 2024 Q1"""
    m = _re.match(r'PIID::(\d{4})Q(\d)', p)
    return f"{m.group(1)} Q{m.group(2)}" if m else p

def _strip_prefix(label, prefix):
    return label[len(prefix):] if label.startswith(prefix) else label

if not project_labels or not piid_labels:
    display(HTML("<p><em>No project or PIID labels found. Ensure epics carry <code>project::</code> and <code>PIID::</code> labels.</em></p>"))
else:
    STATUS_BG = {
        "✅ On Track":   "#d4edda",
        "✅ Complete":   "#d4edda",
        "⚠️ At Risk":   "#fff3cd",
        "❌ Incomplete": "#f8d7da",
        "🔵 Planned":   "#e2e3e5",
    }
    PHASE_ICON = {"Past": "⬜", "Current": "🟢", "Future": "🔵"}

    # Sticky-first-column styles
    th_sticky = 'style="position:sticky;left:0;z-index:2;background:#fff;white-space:nowrap;min-width:7em"'
    td_sticky = 'style="position:sticky;left:0;z-index:1;background:#fff;white-space:nowrap;font-weight:600"'

    # Column headers: abbreviated PI label + phase icon + elapsed%
    pi_ths = "".join(
        f'<th style="white-space:nowrap;text-align:center;min-width:7em">'
        f'{PHASE_ICON.get(piid_meta[p]["phase"], "")} {_abbrev_piid(p)}<br>'
        f'<small style="font-weight:normal;color:#666">'
        f'{"" if piid_meta[p]["pct"] is None else str(piid_meta[p]["pct"]) + "% elapsed"}'
        f'</small></th>'
        for p in piid_labels
    )

    html = (
        '<div style="overflow-x:auto">'
        '<table class="table table-sm table-bordered" style="font-size:0.82em;min-width:max-content">'
        f'<thead><tr><th {th_sticky}>Project</th>{pi_ths}</tr></thead><tbody>'
    )

    for proj in project_labels:
        proj_display = _strip_prefix(proj, "project::")
        row = f'<td {td_sticky}>{proj_display}</td>'
        for piid in piid_labels:
            key  = f"{proj}|{piid}"
            cell = cells.get(key)
            if not cell:
                row += '<td style="color:#bbb;text-align:center;vertical-align:middle">—</td>'
                continue
            bg    = STATUS_BG.get(cell["status"], "")
            pi_s  = f"{cell['pct_pi']}%" if cell["pct_pi"] is not None else "—"
            delta = cell["delta"]
            d_str = f"▲{delta}" if delta > 0 else (f"▼{abs(delta)}" if delta < 0 else "=")
            blk   = f" 🔒{cell['blocked']}" if cell["blocked"] else ""
            row  += (
                f'<td style="background:{bg};vertical-align:top;font-size:0.82em;padding:4px 6px">'
                f'<strong>{cell["status"]}{blk}</strong><br>'
                f'<span style="color:#444">{cell["open"]}/{cell["total"]} epics · {cell["avg_pct"]}% (PI {pi_s})</span><br>'
                f'<span style="color:#555">{cell["planned"]}→{cell["actual"]}pt {d_str}</span><br>'
                f'<a href="{cell["board_url"]}" target="_blank" style="font-size:0.9em">View →</a>'
                f'</td>'
            )
        html += f"<tr>{row}</tr>"

    html += "</tbody></table></div>"
    display(HTML(html))
```

::: {.callout-note collapse="true"}
## Legend

| Icon | Meaning |
|------|---------|
| ✅ On Track | Current PI: % Done ≥ % of PI quarter elapsed |
| ⚠️ At Risk | Current PI: % Done < % of PI quarter elapsed |
| ✅ Complete | Past PI: all committed work finished (% Done = 100%) |
| ❌ Incomplete | Past PI: PI ended with work remaining |
| 🔵 Planned | Future PI: not yet started |
| 🔒 N | N epics in this cell are blocked |

- **% Done** — weighted average completion across epics in the cell (weighted by planned weight)
- **PI elapsed%** — `(today − PI start) ÷ (PI end − PI start) × 100`
- **Planned pt** — sum of planned weights set on those epics
- **Actual pt** — sum of story-point weights on all linked issues
- **Δ** — ▲ actual exceeds planned · ▼ actual below planned · = matched
:::
